title: Mob Heart: Killing Mobs Give you 1 permanent Heart
description: Get permanent extra hearts by killing mobs! Every mob type gives +1 heart ONCE, works across deaths, fully automatic. Includes passive, neutral, hostile, and bosses!
body:
Mob Heart+ is a progression datapack where every mob you kill grants you +1 permanent heart (only once per mob type).
Turn Minecraft into an RPG-style grind where exploring new biomes and fighting different mobs slowly increases your max HP!


⭐ Features


✔ +1 Permanent Heart for each mob type (only once per mob)

✔ Works even after death — heart boosts stay forever

✔ Supports ALL major mobs: passive, neutral, hostile, nether mobs, bosses, villagers, golems & more

✔ Includes a welcome message with clickable links

✔ No lag — super lightweight

✔ Great for survival, hardcore, multiplayer servers


🧠 How It Works


Each mob has a unique score that checks whether you killed it before.

On your first kill of that mob type → you gain +2 max health (1 heart) permanently.

Killing the same mob again will not give extra hearts.

Works automatically in the background.


❤️ Community & Support

This datapack is created by Modular Boy Ansh.

If you enjoy this datapack, leave a ❤️ and follow for updates!
